name: Chicken in Lemon Grass and Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and dry it well. Cut into small pieces.
2. Peel the garlic and slice finely. Cut the onion into halves lengthwise, then cut each half into 1/2 inch strips.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add a pinch of salt, garlic, and onion. Fry until the onion becomes translucent.
4. Add lemon grass and chili. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes until fragrant.
5. Add chicken and cook until lightly browned.
6. Add fish sauce, sugar, and caramel sauce. Mix well.
7. Add 1 cup water and cook for 45 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Stir occasionally and add more water if necessary.
Makes 4 servings. Caramel Sauce: Mix 1/2 cup sugar with 4 tablespoons of water in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat and let boil until the mixture changes color. Turn down the heat to low and cook until brown. Add 1/2 cup water to the mixture. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat and store in a jar in the refrigerator.
